text: Meaning Abbreviation Dose frequency or timing (in the) morning mane (at) night nocte twice a day bd three times a day tds four times a day qid every 4 hours every 4 hrs, 4 hourly, 4 hrly every 6 hours every 6 hrs, 6 hourly, 6 hrly every 8 hours every 8 hrs, 8 hourly, 8 hrly when required prn immediately stat Dose forms capsule cap injection inj metered dose inhaler inhaler, MDI ointment oint patient controlled analgesia PCA pessary pess suppository supp tablet tab Acceptable alternative to writing out in full in EnglishHP 11016 Delivering a Healthy WA Meaning Abbreviation Route of administration intramuscular IM intravenous IV naso-gastric NG nebulised neb oral PO percutanous enteral gastrostomy PEG per rectum PR per vagina PV peripherally inserted central catheter PICC subcutaneous subcut sublingual subling Units of measure and concentration gram(s) g litre(s) L milligram(s) mg millilitre(s) mL microgram(s) microg millimole mmol percentage %
